column1: # Hand-maintained mapping from arc folder/file slug → set metadata.
# Slug: folder name within main-story/ or short-stories/, or filename stem within flavour/.
# SetId: FK to sets.csv (leave blank when no physical set exists).
# DisplayName: override label shown in breadcrumbs and hub pages (leave blank to use SetName from sets.csv).
# ImageLink: S3/CDN URL for the set's marketing image (leave blank until uploaded).
